report_name: AI-Powered 'FinReact' Phishing Campaign Targets Financial Sector with Evasive JavaScript Loader

threat_actors.name: FinReact Actor
threat_actors.description: A skilled, financially motivated threat actor responsible for the 'FinReact' phishing campaign, which uses generative AI to create lures and deploys information stealers.

attack_patterns.name: Spearphishing Attachment
attack_patterns.description: The FinReact campaign delivers a password-protected ZIP file containing a malicious LNK file via a phishing email.

attack_patterns.name: Malicious File
attack_patterns.description: Victims are tricked into executing a malicious LNK file contained within the email attachment.

attack_patterns.name: PowerShell
attack_patterns.description: The malicious LNK file executes a PowerShell command to download the GhostScript loader.

attack_patterns.name: JavaScript
attack_patterns.description: The GhostScript loader, a key component of the campaign, is a JavaScript-based malware.

attack_patterns.name: Debugger Evasion
attack_patterns.description: The GhostScript loader performs anti-analysis checks, including for the presence of debuggers, to evade detection.

attack_patterns.name: Virtualization/Sandbox Evasion
attack_patterns.description: The GhostScript loader checks for sandboxes and virtual machine environments before deploying its final payload.

attack_patterns.name: Credentials from Password Stores
attack_patterns.description: The final payloads, Vidar and IcedID, are information stealers designed to harvest credentials from browsers and other password stores.

attack_patterns.name: LLM Prompt Crafting
attack_patterns.description: The FinReact campaign uses generative AI to craft highly convincing, context-aware, and personalized email lures to bypass traditional security and trick recipients.

attack_patterns.name: Encrypted/Encoded File
attack_patterns.description: A password-protected ZIP file is used to deliver the malicious LNK file, a technique designed to bypass automated email attachment scanners.

malware.name: GhostScript
malware.description: A novel, evasive JavaScript loader used in the FinReact campaign. It performs anti-sandbox and anti-VM checks before downloading the final infostealer payload.

malware.name: Vidar
malware.description: An information-stealing malware deployed as a final payload by the GhostScript loader in the FinReact campaign to steal credentials.

malware.name: IcedID
malware.description: An information-stealing malware and banking trojan deployed as a final payload by the GhostScript loader in the FinReact campaign.

campaigns.name: FinReact
campaigns.description: A large-scale phishing campaign targeting the financial services sector using AI-generated lures and the GhostScript JavaScript loader to deliver infostealers like Vidar and IcedID.

identities.name: Financial Services Industry
identities.description: The primary target of the 'FinReact' phishing campaign, including banks and investment firms.

indicators.name: FinReact LNK PowerShell Execution
indicators.pattern:
title: FinReact LNK PowerShell Execution
id: 2b1a8c3d-9f0e-4b1a-8c3d-9f0e4b1a8c3d
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of a PowerShell download cradle with specific arguments used by the malicious LNK file in the FinReact campaign.
references:
  - https://www.proofpoint.com/us/blog/threat-research/finreact-ai-powered-phishing-targets-financial-sector
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-01
tags:
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.execution
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\powershell.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - '-ExecutionPolicy Bypass'
      - '-NoProfile'
      - '-NonInteractive'
      - '-WindowStyle Hidden'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of a PowerShell download cradle with specific arguments used by the malicious LNK file in the FinReact campaign.

indicators.name: GhostScript Loader Anti-Analysis Behavior
indicators.pattern:
title: GhostScript Loader Anti-Analysis Behavior
id: 5e4d3c2b-1a09-4d3c-8b2a-1a098d3c2b1a
status: experimental
description: Detects suspicious script execution potentially related to the GhostScript loader's anti-analysis checks, where PowerShell spawns a script host.
references:
  - https://www.proofpoint.com/us/blog/threat-research/finreact-ai-powered-phishing-targets-financial-sector
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-01
tags:
  - attack.t1622
  - attack.t1497
  - attack.defense_evasion
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\powershell.exe'
    Image|endswith:
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects suspicious script execution potentially related to the GhostScript loader's anti-analysis checks, where PowerShell spawns a script host.
